codeReview.summary: The feature hardens `CompanyContextFilter` to fail closed for super-admin access on tenant business paths, turns the dealer credit-request compatibility endpoint into an explicit read-only denial, and adds focused regression coverage for dealer write attempts, super-admin tenant workflow denial, export denial, and control-plane path enforcement. The reviewed transcript skeleton shows deliberate red/green validation and the diff preserves tenant isolation while leaving only the intended period-reopen control-plane exception available to super admins.

summary: Pass. Dealer users remain confined to own-record read-only surfaces, super admins are blocked from tenant business execution, and the touched report/accounting export paths fail closed without leaking foreign tenant workflow access.
